title: SPP Operating Reserves CSV download
description:
Total Operating Reserve product (ancillary services) clearing in MW by Reserve Zone in SPP for each Real-Time Balancing Market solution for each Operating Interval.  Posting is updated after each study completes, roughly 5 minutes prior to the end of the operating interval.


Includes data from both SPP East (SPP) and SPP West (SWPW) via the `reserve_zone` column.
